changes: Holy Sheltron: The barrier effect duration has been reduced from 5 seconds to 4 seconds.
Holy Sheltron: The barrier potency has been reduced from 12,000 to 8,000.
Holy Sheltron: The unaspected damage dealt to nearby enemies when the effect expires has been increased from 100% of the remaining barrier potency to 150%.
Holy Sheltron: The Knight's Resolve effect duration has been reduced from 10 seconds to 8 seconds.
Confiteor: Damage potency has been increased from 8,000 to 12,000.
Blade of Faith: Damage potency has been increased from 6,000 to 7,000.
Blade of Truth: Damage potency has been increased from 7,000 to 8,000.
Blade of Valor: Damage potency has been increased from 8,000 to 9,000.
Honing Ovation: Attack and barrier potency granted by each stack of Acclaim has been decreased from 2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000/6,000 to 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000.

new_content.name: The Abyssal Fracture (Extreme)
new_content.description: Moved from Raid Finder to Duty Finder; increased drop rate for Lynx of Abyssal Grief Flute.

new_content.name: Anabaseios: The Twelfth Circle
new_content.description: Weekly restriction on receiving Unsung Blades of Anabaseios has been removed.

new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Anabaseios (Savage)
new_content.description: Echo effect increased to 15% (maximum HP, damage dealt, and healing potency).

new_content.name: Thaleia
new_content.description: Weekly limit on rewards from treasure coffers and Thaleia coins removed.

new_content.name: Alexander - The Burden of the Son (Savage)
new_content.description: Resolved an issue where the enemy action Height Error was not downscaled.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: Season Ten end and Season Eleven start; adjustments made to PvP actions and map display issues.

new_content.name: Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: Increased reward for completing two rows from 500 to 1,000 Allagan tomestones of causality.

new_content.name: The Satrap of Radz-at-Han
new_content.description: Main scenario quest issue addressed regarding Estinien's presence in the Baldesion Annex.

new_content.name: Breaking Brick Mountains
new_content.description: Resolved an issue regarding repurchasing the Thug's Mug item.

new_content.name: Data Center Travel
new_content.description: Cloud data center removed; Oceanian data center added as a destination for travel.

new_content.name: Equipment Enhancement
new_content.description: System to exchange coins for Divine Solvent and upgrade gear.

housing.name: Thug's Mug
housing.description: An item previously obtainable from the seasonal quest 'Breaking Brick Mountains', now available for repurchase from the recompense officer.

glamour.name: Thug's Mug
glamour.description: An item mentioned in the resolved issues section that players were previously unable to repurchase from the recompense officer after completing the 'Breaking Brick Mountains' seasonal quest.
